description: Workflow chaining: after an ADR is written, suggest a quick quality review

hooks.prompt: A file was just written. Check the file path. If it matches docs/adr/ (an Architecture Decision Record), suggest: 'ADR created — would you like a quick quality check with /review-adr? It verifies completeness and MADR structure using a lightweight model.' Only suggest this once per ADR file in this session. If the file is not an ADR, produce no output.
